messages.content: Using after effects expressions I would like to select each word in a sentence of a text layer using Animator.  I would like to control it using Controller Slider.
Can you please try it again, It did not work, gives an error
Please try to fix previous solution where you had used Expression Selector
That does not give any problem but I want to hide other words except of selected using Word Index Slider.
How to range map control slider values in after effects using after effects scripting
How to get size of text in after effects scripting
Width is not being calculated, we need both values
It will be an expression.  Text size will be read from parent text layer.
